cloudflared service:
# /etc/systemd/system/cloudflared.service
[Unit]
Description=cloudflared
After=network-online.target
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
TimeoutStartSec=15
Type=notify
ExecStart=/usr/bin/cloudflared --no-autoupdate tunnel run --token eyJhIjoiZmZlMWQyZjg2NjFiYzM3MWQxMzhkNjE1ZTQzNGZiOGEiLCJ0IjoiZDU2YTI2OTEtNTk3NS00MmQ3LTg4ZmUtOTY0M2U1MGM1NTY5IiwicyI6Ill6RmpNVGs1WkRndE5UZzFPUzAwWTJVd0xXSmtaakl0TlRNMlpqazVZV1ZqTUdZNSJ9
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=5s

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
